title: Extrude end-conditions: ThroughAll (cut) + two-direction + Symmetric
source: OneCAD-CPP/tests/prototypes/proto_regeneration.cpp:1489-1523 — 'Through-all cut removes a full-height column': base 20x20x10 box vol 4000, then 5x5 ThroughAll Cut -> vol 3750 (4000 - 5*5*10).
OneCAD-CPP/tests/prototypes/proto_regeneration.cpp:1462-1487 — 'Two-direction extrude sums both depths': 10x10 footprint, dir1 Blind 5 + dir2 Blind 3 -> vol 800 (10*10*8).

OneCAD-CPP/tests/prototypes/proto_regeneration.cpp:1525-1560 — 'To-Face extrude stops at the target face': 5x5 region up to z=10 top face -> vol 250 (5*5*10). (Sibling end-condition, included for completeness.)
OneCAD-CPP/tests/prototypes/proto_regeneration.cpp:1562-1583 — 'To-Next without a target body is rejected': ToNext with NewBody fails the op (AddOperationCommand returns false).
OneCAD-CPP/src/app/document/OperationRecord.h:83-104 — ExtrudeMode enum + ExtrudeParams field names; :86 'Symmetric // Half-distance both directions'.

opScript.note: distance sign only selects the through-all direction; extent is the target bbox (see H4 'ThroughAll bbox extent', TODO.md:148).
Independent scenario (separate document in the C++ test); two directions sum to depth 8.
Symmetric = half-distance each side of the sketch plane (OperationRecord.h:86). See expected.symmetric for provenance caveat.

toFace_sibling.provenance: proto_regeneration.cpp:1543-1557 (5x5 region to top face z=10)

toNext_rejection.outcome: op rejected (regeneration fails, command rolls back)
toNext_rejection.newStackMapping: worker returns terminal resp error.code OP_FAILED or UNSUPPORTED (recoverable, session intact) per SCHEMA §8; NOT NeedsRepair.

symmetric.note: NO current OneCAD-CPP test asserts a Symmetric extrude volume. Value shown is the geometric derivation (10x10 x total 8) for a distance-8 Symmetric, NOT a captured assertion. Do not treat as an oracle number; capture from the new worker and, if desired, add a Symmetric golden. The Symmetric MODE and its 'half each side' semantics ARE established (OperationRecord.h:86).

notes: Covers three distinct end conditions plus the ToNext rejection. Only ThroughAll (3750), two-direction (800) and ToFace (250) carry hard C++ numeric assertions. Symmetric is structurally specified but numerically un-asserted by the old stack — flagged so no invented number leaks into a golden.
